name: @openparachute/app-monorepo
description: Workspace root for parachute-app — host module (@openparachute/app) + shared client library (@openparachute/app-client).

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@openparachute/app-client' build && bun run --filter '@openparachute/app' build
scripts.test: bun test packages/app-host/src/ packages/app-client/src/ && bun run --filter "@openparachute/notes-ui" test
scripts.test:all: bun run test && cd web/admin && bun run test
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/app-host && tsc --noEmit && cd ../app-client && tsc --noEmit && cd ../notes-ui && tsc -b --noEmit
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:admin
